/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_format.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/fs_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_shell.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_ls.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_cd.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_close.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_open.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_create.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_mkdir.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_rmdir.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_write.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_read.c.o CMakeFiles/myfs.dir/src/my_rm.c.o -o myfs
